LocaleLayout.title: Apartment System
LocaleLayout.description: Apartment management for building teams and residents.

NotFoundPage.title: Page not found
NotFoundPage.body: The link may be wrong or the page was removed.

HomePage.heading: Property management MVP
HomePage.intro: Open the admin console to manage properties, units, residents, leases, and maintenance.

PropertiesPage.title: Properties
PropertiesPage.subtitle: Buildings or sites you manage. Labels for units must be unique within each property.
PropertiesPage.listError: Could not load properties. Please try again.

PropertyDetailPage.label: Unit label
PropertyDetailPage.fetchErrorBody: Something went wrong. If you were signed out, sign in again.

UnitsPage.title: Units
UnitsPage.subtitle: Leasable spaces linked to a property. Create units from a property’s page.

ResidentsPage.title: Residents
ResidentsPage.subtitle: People records; email must be unique in this MVP.

LeasesPage.title: Leases
LeasesPage.subtitle: Contracts for a unit. Only one active lease per unit is allowed; activating sets the unit to occupied.
LeasesPage.addHint: Use resident ObjectIds from the list below, comma-separated for co-tenants.

MaintenancePage.title: Maintenance
MaintenancePage.subtitle: Unit-linked requests (MVP slice from the product feature list).

Auth.loginSubtitle: Staff and residents use the same login. Choose email and password or Google.
Auth.registerSubtitle: Use the email you share with the building. If it is already linked, sign in instead.
Auth.googleError: Google sign-in failed. Try again or use email and password.

MyPortal.title: Resident portal
MyPortal.homeUnknown: No primary unit on file yet. Ask the office to link your unit.
MyPortal.noActiveLease: No active lease on file. Billing and maintenance requests need an active lease.
MyPortal.summaryRentLink: Browse vacant units to rent online
MyPortal.forbiddenHint: This area is for residents. If you are staff, open the admin console instead.
MyPortal.loadError: Could not load data. Check that you are signed in, then try again.
MyPortal.maintenanceSubtitle: Submit requests for units on your active lease.
MyPortal.maintenanceNoUnit: You need an active lease with a unit before you can submit maintenance requests.

rentBook.title: Rent a unit
rentBook.subtitle: Vacant units with published rent can be booked online; your lease becomes active when you confirm.
rentBook.empty: No units are available for online rent right now. Contact the office when a room opens up.
rentBook.loadError: Could not load available units. Check that you are signed in, then try again.
rentBook.loadError404Hint: This page is not available right now. Please try again later or contact your building office.
rentBook.loadError403Hint: You may be signed in with a non-resident account, or your session has no resident profile.
rentBook.endHint: Leave blank for open-ended. If set, end date must be after the start date.

MyPortal.walletSubtitle: Your balance in THB (satang). Top-ups are simulated credits for this MVP.
MyPortal.walletSignInHint: Sign in to view your wallet.
MyPortal.walletMinorHint: Amounts are stored in satang (1 THB = 100 satang). Transfers require the recipient’s user ObjectId from their profile.
MyPortal.walletTopUpHint: Adds demo credit to your wallet (no real payment).
MyPortal.walletTransferHint: Send THB to another registered user. They must give you their user id (same as yours on this page).
